item.title: Alfafaa Knowledge Hub Engineering
item.description: Alfafaa Knowledge Hub Engineering This landing page was generated automatically from the staged knowledge-hub content. Sections 03-projects .

item.title: Billing Service Documentation
item.description: Billing Service Documentation Catalog Entry This page was generated from an indexed-only document.

item.title: Payment Recovery Runbook
item.description: Payment Recovery Runbook Trigger Use this runbook when repeated payment attempts fail for a live customer account and recovery automation has stopped progressing.

item.title: Use Ledger Table For Charge Events
item.description: ADR-001 Use Ledger Table For Charge Events Status Accepted Context The billing service needs a durable record of charge attempts, retries, reversals, and recovery actions.

item.title: Billing System Design
item.description: Billing System Design Purpose The billing service records charge attempts, payment outcomes, and recovery actions for subscription events.
